One Identity Manager API Server

The DynamicallyTypedCrudMethod type exposes the following members.

Adds an additional GET method handler based on entity data.

FromTableOverloaded.
Creates an API method that will read/write data from a database table, but the related table is not known at compile time.
(Defined by CrudExtensions.)
FromTable(String)Overloaded. (Defined by CrudExtensions.)
GetCrudModel
Returns the existing CRUD model for the given method, or null if there is none.
(Defined by CrudExtensions.)
Handle(String, ActionIRequest)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input and returns no data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
Handle(String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, Task)Overloaded.
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data, and returns no data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
Handle(String, IResponseBuilderSelector)Overloaded.
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request that takes no input data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent(String, ActionTContent, IRequest)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent(String, FuncTContent, IRequest, CancellationToken, Task)Overloaded.
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
HandleTResult(String, FuncIRequest, TResult)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)

Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)

Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)

Defines a method for a GET handler that returns entities from the database.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)

Defines a method for a GET handler that returns entities from the database.

Defines a method for a GET handler that returns entities from the database.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
HandleGetBySqlStatement(String, SqlStatementType)Overloaded.
Defines a method handler to return the result of a call to a pre-defined SQL statement.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
HandleGetBySqlStatement(FuncIRequest, String, SqlStatementType)Overloaded.
Defines a method handler to return the results of one or more calls to pre-defined SQL statements.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
HandleGetBySqlStatement(FuncIRequest, IReadOnlyListSqlStatementRun, SqlStatementType)Overloaded.
Defines a method handler to return the results of one or more calls to pre-defined SQL statements.
(Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
